// Build SQL — Estrategia de matching Robusta (UNACCENT)
const d = $input.first()?.json;
const esc = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 200);
const safeName = esc(d.service_name);

const query = `
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    s.id AS service_id,
    s.name AS service_name,
    ps.price,
    ps.currency,
    CASE
      WHEN unaccent(LOWER(s.name)) = unaccent(LOWER('${safeName}')) THEN 1.0
      WHEN unaccent(LOWER(s.name)) ILIKE unaccent('${safeName}%') THEN 0.9
      WHEN unaccent(LOWER(s.name)) ILIKE unaccent('%${safeName}%') THEN 0.8
      WHEN unaccent(LOWER('${safeName}')) ILIKE '%' || unaccent(LOWER(s.name)) || '%' THEN 0.7
      ELSE 0.0
    END AS match_score
  FROM public.services s
  JOIN public.provider_services ps ON ps.service_id = s.id
  JOIN public.providers p ON ps.provider_id = p.id
  WHERE p.is_active = true 
    AND ps.provider_id = ${d.provider_id}::bigint
)
SELECT service_id, service_name, price, currency, match_score
FROM ranked WHERE match_score > 0
ORDER BY match_score DESC LIMIT 3;`.trim();

return [{ json: { query, provider_id: d.provider_id, service_name: d.service_name } }];
